engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a person — the reader/counselor CHIHO — evidenced by the founder profile, WHO-gatekeeper instructor certification, non-judgmental approach statements, and 'first-time visitor' reassurance. The service is defined expertise sold on credibility, not a browsable product or portfolio.

goal.one_action: phone the salon to book a divination/counseling session

structure.archetype_note: WordPress multipage practitioner site; content/blog-heavy, phone-only conversion, pricing page not in main nav; mixes divination-counseling with calligraphy classes and unrelated ventures.

mapped.observed_as: 占術鑑定で、お悩みを紐解く
青山で、占術鑑定とカウンセリング
こんな悩みはありませんか？
多国の占術を使ってケア / 決めつけない
代表CHIHO プロフィール
海外活動 (international activities / embassy visits)
サロン紹介 (3 locations w/ hours/access)
お問い合わせはコチラ (tel)

unmapped.observed: 教室案内 (calligraphy / sutra-copying / money-flower class offerings)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A distinct second service line (classes) unrelated to the divination-counseling funnel; not a section of the primary offer but a parallel business advertised on the same site

unmapped.observed: コンテンツ (category links: 夢叶メッセージ, 海外活動, ゲートキーパー)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Content-taxonomy link strip, not a persuasion section

components_needed: location cards with hours + embedded map

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full, but the site conflates multiple unrelated service lines (divination salon, calligraphy classes, cafe venture) making the single conversion intent fuzzy; primary action inferred as the phone CTA since there is no form.

gap_findings: Site advertises multiple parallel businesses on one domain (divination-counseling + calligraphy classroom + antique/cafe) — the taxonomy assumes ONE offer/one conversion; no clean way to express a multi-service-line practitioner site.
Blog/content is a major surface (20 posts, category strips) yet conversion is a single phone call — the 'trust' engine has no slot for content-marketing-as-proof beyond blog capability.
